title: QuantSafe external-screen request
description: Aggregate refusal-behavior evidence for a (baseline, candidate) checkpoint pair. Contains ONLY aggregate features; no probe prompts, completions, or model weights. QuantSafe returns a provisional, unsigned screening recommendation without loading a model or fetching a URL.

count.description: Number of probes both sides were evaluated on.

sha256.description: Lowercase hex SHA-256 of the probe set (commitment only; QuantSafe never sees the probes).

repo_id.description: Model identifier (reflected only HTML-escaped; never fetched).

quantization.description: Quantization label, e.g. FP16, Q4_K_M, GPTQ.

n_refusals.description: Count of probes the model refused; must be <= probe_set.count.

dominant_prefix_share.description: Share of refusals opening with the single most-common 5-token prefix.

unique_prefix_rate.description: Unique 5-token refusal prefixes / number of refusals.

prefix_entropy_norm.description: Shannon entropy over refusal-prefix distribution, normalized to [0,1].

mean_tokens_refusal.description: Mean token length of refusal completions.
